project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run build' to confirm no TypeScript or build errors. Visually verify components render correctly.
environment_constraints: Next.js 16 with React 19. Tailwind CSS v4. lucide-react for icons. 'use client' directive needed for interactive components.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing component patterns - 'use client' for interactive, separate component files in components/ subdirectories
key_patterns: Dark navy (#0A0F1E) + emerald/teal (#00D4AA) color scheme. Components use 'use client' directive for interactivity. Rounded-2xl cards with hover effects. Gradient text with bg-clip-text. Forms use standard HTML inputs with Tailwind classes. Layout imports components in app/layout.tsx for global placement.
directory_structure: app/ - pages (App Router), components/ - organized by type (features, layouts, ui, ads, etc.), lib/ - utilities
